Spring Data Redis

    Deprecated API

    Contents

    • Terminally Deprecated
    • Interfaces
    • Classes
    • Enum Classes
    • Fields
    • Methods
    • Constructors
    • Terminally Deprecated Elements
      Element
      Description
      org.springframework.data.redis.cache.RedisCacheWriter.clean(String, byte[])
      since 4.0 in favor of RedisCacheWriter.clear(String, byte[])
      org.springframework.data.redis.cache.RedisCacheWriter.remove(String, byte[])
      since 4.0 in favor of RedisCacheWriter.evict(String, byte[])
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnection(Jedis)
      since 4.1, for removal; use JedisConnection(UnifiedJedis) instead.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnection(Jedis, Pool<Jedis>, int)
      since 4.1, for removal; use JedisConnection(UnifiedJedis) instead.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnection(Jedis, Pool<Jedis>, int, String)
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnection(Jedis, Pool<Jedis>, JedisClientConfig, JedisClientConfig)
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnectionFactory.createCluster(RedisClusterConfiguration, GenericObjectPoolConfig<Connection>)
      since 4.1, use JedisConnectionFactory.createRedisClusterClient(RedisClusterConfiguration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnectionFactory.createTopologyProvider(JedisCluster)
      since 2.2, use JedisConnectionFactory.createTopologyProvider(UnifiedJedis) instead.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnectionFactory.setPoolConfig(JedisPoolConfig)
      since 2.0, configure JedisPoolConfig using JedisClientConfiguration.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.lettuce.LettuceConverters.toSetArgs(Expiration, RedisStringCommands.SetOption)
      since 4.1.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.util.DecodeUtils
      since 4.0 for removal. Use Base64 encoding and decoding methods directly.
      org.springframework.data.redis.hash.Jackson2HashMapper
      since 4.0 in favor of JacksonHashMapper.
      org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer
      since 4.0 in favor of GenericJacksonJsonRedisSerializer
      org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.Jackson2JsonRedisSerializer
      since 4.0 in favor of JacksonJsonRedisSerializer.
      org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.Jackson2JsonRedisSerializer.DEFAULT_CHARSET
      since 3.0 for removal.
      org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.Jackson2JsonRedisSerializer.setObjectMapper(ObjectMapper)
      since 3.0, use constructor creation to configure the object mapper.
      org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.Jackson2ObjectReader
      since 4.0 in favor of JacksonObjectReader.
      org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.Jackson2ObjectWriter
      since 4.0 in favor of JacksonObjectWriter.
    • Deprecated Interfaces
      Interface
      Description
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.DefaultedRedisClusterConnection
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.DefaultedRedisConnection
      org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.Jackson2ObjectReader
      since 4.0 in favor of JacksonObjectReader.
      org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.Jackson2ObjectWriter
      since 4.0 in favor of JacksonObjectWriter.
    • Deprecated Classes
      Class
      Description
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.RedisZSetCommands.Limit
      since 3.0, use Limit instead.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.RedisZSetCommands.Range
      since 3.0, use Range or RedisZSetCommands.Range.toRange() instead.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.util.DecodeUtils
      since 4.0 for removal. Use Base64 encoding and decoding methods directly.
      org.springframework.data.redis.hash.Jackson2HashMapper
      since 4.0 in favor of JacksonHashMapper.
      org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer
      since 4.0 in favor of GenericJacksonJsonRedisSerializer
      org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.Jackson2JsonRedisSerializer
      since 4.0 in favor of JacksonJsonRedisSerializer.

      Enum Class
      Description
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.RedisStringCommands.SetOption
      since 4.1 in favor of SetCondition
    • Deprecated Fields
      Field
      Description
      org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.Jackson2JsonRedisSerializer.DEFAULT_CHARSET
      since 3.0 for removal.

      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisClientConfiguration.getCustomizer()
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisClientConfiguration.JedisClientConfigurationBuilder.customize(JedisClientConfigBuilderCustomizer)
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnectionFactory.createCluster(RedisClusterConfiguration, GenericObjectPoolConfig<Connection>)
      since 4.1, use JedisConnectionFactory.createRedisClusterClient(RedisClusterConfiguration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnectionFactory.createTopologyProvider(JedisCluster)
      since 2.2, use JedisConnectionFactory.createTopologyProvider(UnifiedJedis) instead.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnectionFactory.fetchJedisConnector()
      since 4.1, use JedisConnectionFactory.getRequiredRedisClient() instead.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnectionFactory.getUsePool()
      since 4.1 all Jedis single node connections are always using connection pooling
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnectionFactory.setClientName(String)
      since 2.0, configure the client name using JedisClientConfiguration.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnectionFactory.setDatabase(int)
      since 2.0, configure the database index using RedisStandaloneConfiguration or RedisSentinelConfiguration.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnectionFactory.setHostName(String)
      since 2.0, configure the hostname using RedisStandaloneConfiguration.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnectionFactory.setPassword(String)
      since 2.0, configure the password using RedisStandaloneConfiguration, RedisSentinelConfiguration or RedisClusterConfiguration.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnectionFactory.setPoolConfig(JedisPoolConfig)
      since 2.0, configure JedisPoolConfig using JedisClientConfiguration.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnectionFactory.setPort(int)
      since 2.0, configure the port using RedisStandaloneConfiguration.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnectionFactory.setTimeout(int)
      since 2.0, configure the timeout using JedisClientConfiguration.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnectionFactory.setUsePool(boolean)
      since 2.0, configure pooling usage with JedisClientConfiguration.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnectionFactory.setUseSsl(boolean)
      since 2.0, configure the SSL usage with JedisClientConfiguration.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.lettuce.LettuceClientConfiguration.isVerifyPeer()
      since 3.4, use LettuceClientConfiguration.getVerifyMode() for how peer verification is configured.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.lettuce.LettuceConnectionFactory.isVerifyPeer()
      since 3.4, use LettuceClientConfiguration.getVerifyMode() instead.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.lettuce.LettuceConnectionFactory.setClientName(String)
      configure the client name using LettuceClientConfiguration.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.lettuce.LettuceConnectionFactory.setClientResources(ClientResources)
      since 2.0, configure ClientResources using LettuceClientConfiguration.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.lettuce.LettuceConnectionFactory.setDatabase(int)
      since 3.2, configure the database index using RedisStandaloneConfiguration, RedisSocketConfiguration, RedisSentinelConfiguration, or RedisStaticMasterReplicaConfiguration.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.lettuce.LettuceConnectionFactory.setHostName(String)
      since 2.0, configure the hostname using RedisStandaloneConfiguration.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.lettuce.LettuceConnectionFactory.setPassword(String)
      since 2.0, configure the password using RedisStandaloneConfiguration, RedisSentinelConfiguration or RedisClusterConfiguration.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.lettuce.LettuceConnectionFactory.setPort(int)
      since 2.0, configure the port using RedisStandaloneConfiguration.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.lettuce.LettuceConnectionFactory.setShutdownTimeout(long)
      since 2.0, configure the shutdown timeout using LettuceClientConfiguration.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.lettuce.LettuceConnectionFactory.setStartTls(boolean)
      since 2.0, configure StartTLS using LettuceClientConfiguration.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.lettuce.LettuceConnectionFactory.setTimeout(long)
      since 2.0, configure the timeout using LettuceClientConfiguration.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.lettuce.LettuceConnectionFactory.setUseSsl(boolean)
      since 2.0, configure SSL usage using LettuceClientConfiguration.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.lettuce.LettuceConnectionFactory.setVerifyPeer(boolean)
      since 2.0, configure peer verification using LettuceClientConfiguration.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.lettuce.LettuceConverters.toSetArgs(Expiration, RedisStringCommands.SetOption)
      since 4.1.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.ReactiveStreamCommands.TrimCommand.approximate()
      since 4.0: do not toggle the trim operator in isolation. Specify a concrete trim strategy (MAXLEN or MINID) and operator via RedisStreamCommands.XTrimOptions and RedisStreamCommands.TrimOptions, e.g. options(XTrimOptions.trim(TrimOptions.maxLen(n).approximate())).
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.ReactiveStreamCommands.TrimCommand.approximate(boolean)
      since 4.0: do not toggle the trim operator in isolation. Specify a concrete trim strategy (MAXLEN or MINID) and operator via RedisStreamCommands.XTrimOptions and RedisStreamCommands.TrimOptions, e.g. options(XTrimOptions.trim(TrimOptions.maxLen(n).approximate())) or options(XTrimOptions.trim(TrimOptions.minId(id).exact())).
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.ReactiveStreamCommands.TrimCommand.getCount()
      since 4.0: Inspect ReactiveStreamCommands.TrimCommand.getOptions() -> RedisStreamCommands.XTrimOptions.getTrimOptions() -> RedisStreamCommands.TrimOptions.getTrimStrategy() and obtain the threshold from the concrete strategy instead. For example: if (strategy instanceof MaxLenTrimStrategy m) { m.threshold(); } or if (strategy instanceof MinIdTrimStrategy i) { i.threshold(); }.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.ReactiveStreamCommands.TrimCommand.stream(ByteBuffer)
      since 4.0, prefer ReactiveStreamCommands.TrimCommand.stream(ByteBuffer, XTrimOptions) instead.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.ReactiveStreamCommands.TrimCommand.to(long)
      since 4.0: specify a concrete trim strategy (MAXLEN or MINID) via RedisStreamCommands.XTrimOptions and RedisStreamCommands.TrimOptions instead of using this method. Prefer options(XTrimOptions.trim(TrimOptions.maxLen(threshold))) or construct with stream(key, XTrimOptions.trim(TrimOptions.maxLen(threshold))).
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.ReactiveStringCommands.set(ByteBuffer, ByteBuffer, Expiration, RedisStringCommands.SetOption)
      since 4.1 in favor of ReactiveStringCommands.set(ByteBuffer, ByteBuffer, SetCondition, Expiration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.ReactiveStringCommands.SetCommand.getOption()
      since 4.1 in favor of ReactiveStringCommands.SetCommand.getCondition().
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.ReactiveStringCommands.SetCommand.withSetOption(RedisStringCommands.SetOption)
      since 4.1 in favor of ReactiveStringCommands.SetCommand.withCondition(SetCondition).
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.ReactiveStringCommands.setGet(ByteBuffer, ByteBuffer, Expiration, RedisStringCommands.SetOption)
      since 4.1 in favor of ReactiveStringCommands.setGet(ByteBuffer, ByteBuffer, SetCondition, Expiration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.RedisStreamCommands.XAddOptions.approximateTrimming(boolean)
      since 4.0: callers must specify a concrete trim strategy (MAXLEN or MINID) via RedisStreamCommands.TrimOptions; do not use this method to only toggle approximate/exact. Prefer XAddOptions.trim(TrimOptions.maxLen(n).approximate()) or XAddOptions.trim(TrimOptions.minId(id).exact()).
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.RedisStringCommands.set(byte[], byte[], Expiration, RedisStringCommands.SetOption)
      since 4.1 in favor of RedisStringCommands.set(byte[], byte[], SetCondition, Expiration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.RedisStringCommands.setGet(byte[], byte[], Expiration, RedisStringCommands.SetOption)
      since 4.1 in favor of RedisStringCommands.set(byte[], byte[], SetCondition, Expiration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.RedisZSetCommands.zRangeByScore(byte[], String, String)
      since 3.0, use RedisZSetCommands.zRangeByScore(byte[], org.springframework.data.domain.Range) instead.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.StringRedisConnection.set(String, String, Expiration, RedisStringCommands.SetOption)
      since 4.1 in favor of StringRedisConnection.set(String, String, SetCondition, Expiration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.BoundKeyOperations.expire(long, TimeUnit)
      since 4.1 in favor of BoundKeyOperations.expire(Expiration)
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.BoundListOperations.leftPop(long, TimeUnit)
      since 4.1 in favor of BoundListOperations.leftPop(Duration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.BoundListOperations.move(RedisListCommands.Direction, K, RedisListCommands.Direction, long, TimeUnit)
      since 4.1 in favor of BoundListOperations.move(Direction, Object, Direction, Duration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.BoundListOperations.rightPop(long, TimeUnit)
      since 4.1 in favor of BoundListOperations.leftPop(Duration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.BoundSetOperations.diffAndStore(K, K)
      since 3.0, use BoundSetOperations.differenceAndStore(Object, Object) instead to follow a consistent method naming scheme.
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.BoundSetOperations.diffAndStore(Collection<K>, K)
      since 3.0, use BoundSetOperations.differenceAndStore(Collection, Object) instead to follow a consistent method naming scheme.
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.BoundValueOperations.getAndExpire(long, TimeUnit)
      since 4.1 in favor of BoundValueOperations.getAndExpire(Expiration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.BoundValueOperations.set(V, long, TimeUnit)
      since 4.1 in favor of BoundValueOperations.set(Object, Expiration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.BoundValueOperations.setGet(V, long, TimeUnit)
      since 4.1 in favor of BoundValueOperations.setGet(Object, Consumer).
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.BoundValueOperations.setIfAbsent(V, long, TimeUnit)
      since 4.1 in favor of BoundValueOperations.setIfAbsent(Object, Expiration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.BoundValueOperations.setIfPresent(V, long, TimeUnit)
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.BoundZSetOperations.popMax(long, TimeUnit)
      since 4.1 in favor of BoundZSetOperations.popMax(Duration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.BoundZSetOperations.popMin(long, TimeUnit)
      since 4.1 in favor of BoundZSetOperations.popMin(Duration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.ConvertingCursor.getCursorId()
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.Cursor.getCursorId()
      since 3.3, use Cursor.getId() instead as the cursorId can exceed Long.MAX_VALUE.
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.ListOperations.leftPop(K, long, TimeUnit)
      since 4.1 in favor of ListOperations.leftPop(Object, Duration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.ListOperations.move(K, RedisListCommands.Direction, K, RedisListCommands.Direction, long, TimeUnit)
      since 4.1 in favor of ListOperations.move(Object, Direction, Object, Direction, Duration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.ListOperations.rightPop(K, long, TimeUnit)
      since 4.1 in favor of ListOperations.rightPop(Object, Duration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.ListOperations.rightPopAndLeftPush(K, K, long, TimeUnit)
      since 4.1 in favor of ListOperations.rightPopAndLeftPush(Object, Object, Duration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.RedisOperations.expire(K, long, TimeUnit)
      since 4.1 in favor of RedisOperations.expire(Object, Expiration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.RedisOperations.restore(K, byte[], long, TimeUnit)
      since 4.1 in favor of RedisOperations.restore(Object, byte[], Expiration)
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.RedisOperations.restore(K, byte[], long, TimeUnit, boolean)
      since 4.1 in favor of RedisOperations.restore(Object, byte[], Expiration, boolean).
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.RedisTemplate.expire(K, long, TimeUnit)
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.RedisTemplate.restore(K, byte[], long, TimeUnit, boolean)
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.ScanCursor.doScan(long, ScanOptions)
      since 3.3 cursorId, can exceed Long.MAX_VALUE.
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.ValueOperations.getAndExpire(K, long, TimeUnit)
      since 4.1 in favor of ValueOperations.getAndExpire(Object, Expiration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.ValueOperations.set(K, V, long, TimeUnit)
      since 4.1 in favor of ValueOperations.set(Object, Object, Expiration)
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.ValueOperations.setGet(K, V, long, TimeUnit)
      since 4.1 in favor of ValueOperations.setGet(Object, Object, Expiration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.ValueOperations.setIfAbsent(K, V, long, TimeUnit)
      since 4.1 in favor of ValueOperations.setIfAbsent(Object, Object, Expiration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.ValueOperations.setIfPresent(K, V, long, TimeUnit)
      since 4.1 in favor of ValueOperations.setIfPresent(Object, Object, Expiration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.ZSetOperations.popMax(K, long, TimeUnit)
      since 4.1 in favor of ZSetOperations.popMax(Object, Duration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.ZSetOperations.popMin(K, long, TimeUnit)
      since 4.1 in favor of ZSetOperations.popMin(Object, Duration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.Jackson2JsonRedisSerializer.setObjectMapper(ObjectMapper)
      since 3.0, use constructor creation to configure the object mapper.
      org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.RedisSerializationContext.raw()
      since 2.2. Please use RedisSerializationContext.byteArray() instead.
      org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.RedisSerializationContext.SerializationPair.raw()
      since 2.2. Please use either RedisSerializationContext.SerializationPair.byteArray() or RedisSerializationContext.SerializationPair.byteBuffer().

      org.springframework.data.redis.support.atomic.RedisAtomicInteger.expire(long, TimeUnit)

      org.springframework.data.redis.support.collections.DefaultRedisList.moveLastTo(RedisList<E>, RedisListCommands.Direction, long, TimeUnit)

      since 4.1 in favor of RedisList.moveFirstTo(RedisList, Direction, Duration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.support.collections.RedisList.moveLastTo(RedisList<E>, RedisListCommands.Direction, long, TimeUnit)
      since 4.1 in favor of RedisList.moveLastTo(RedisList, Direction, Duration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.support.collections.RedisProperties.expire(long, TimeUnit)
    • Deprecated Constructors
      Constructor
      Description
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisClusterConnection(JedisCluster)
      since 4.1, use JedisClusterConnection(RedisClusterClient) instead.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisClusterConnection(JedisCluster, ClusterCommandExecutor)
      since 4.1, use JedisClusterConnection(redis.clients.jedis.@org.jspecify.annotations.NonNull RedisClusterClient,org.springframework.data.redis.connection.@org.jspecify.annotations.NonNull ClusterCommandExecutor) instead.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisClusterConnection(JedisCluster, ClusterCommandExecutor, ClusterTopologyProvider)
      since 4.1, use JedisClusterConnection(redis.clients.jedis.@org.jspecify.annotations.NonNull RedisClusterClient,org.springframework.data.redis.connection.@org.jspecify.annotations.NonNull ClusterCommandExecutor,org.springframework.data.redis.connection.@org.jspecify.annotations.NonNull ClusterTopologyProvider) instead.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisClusterConnection.JedisClusterTopologyProvider(JedisCluster)
      since 4.1 in favor of JedisClusterTopologyProvider(UnifiedJedis, Duration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisClusterConnection.JedisClusterTopologyProvider(JedisCluster, Duration)
      since 4.1 in favor of JedisClusterTopologyProvider(RedisClusterClient, Duration).
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnection(Jedis)
      since 4.1, for removal; use JedisConnection(UnifiedJedis) instead.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnection(Jedis, Pool<Jedis>, int)
      since 4.1, for removal; use JedisConnection(UnifiedJedis) instead.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnection(Jedis, Pool<Jedis>, int, String)
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnection(Jedis, Pool<Jedis>, JedisClientConfig, JedisClientConfig)
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnectionFactory(RedisSentinelConfiguration, JedisPoolConfig)
      since 4.1 use JedisConnectionFactory(RedisSentinelConfiguration, JedisClientConfiguration) instead.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnectionFactory(RedisClusterConfiguration, JedisPoolConfig)
      since 4.1 use JedisConnectionFactory(RedisClusterConfiguration, JedisClientConfiguration) instead.
      org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnectionFactory(JedisPoolConfig)
      since 4.1 use JedisConnectionFactory(JedisClientConfiguration) instead.
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.KeyBoundCursor(byte[], long, ScanOptions)
      since 3.3 - Use KeyBoundCursor(byte[], CursorId, ScanOptions) instead.
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.ScanCursor(long)
      since 3.3 - Use ScanCursor(CursorId) instead.
      org.springframework.data.redis.core.ScanCursor(long, ScanOptions)
      since 3.3 - Use ScanCursor(CursorId, ScanOptions) instead.
